TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Patrick_Amedori, title = John_Patrick_Amedori, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Patrick_Amedori} }

S.FORM: John Patrick Amedori kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 4, John Patrick Amedori, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
John Patrick Amedori kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 4, John Patrick Amedori, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *oħn patriʦ~ʨk ame*ori kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn patriʦ~ʨk ame*ori, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
